zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Deincourt於大約1402年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒時，她的父親John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt22歲，母親Joan de Grey19歲。她於1420年之前與Lord William Lovell Holland VII在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1474年2月19日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾拉普斯頓享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Deincourt于大约1402年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒时，她的父亲John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt22岁，母亲Joan de Grey19岁。她于1420年之前与Lord William Lovell Holland VII在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1474年2月19日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾拉普斯頓享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Deincourt was born about 1402, in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt, was 22 and her mother, Joan de Grey, was 19. She married Lord William Lovell Holland VII before 1420, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 19 February 1474, in Thrapston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Deincourt est née environ 1402, à Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan de Grey, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Lord William Lovell Holland VII avant 1420, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 19 février 1474, à Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Minster Lovell, Witney, Oxfordshire, Eng: Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Deincourt um 1402 in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt 22 und ihre Mutter Joan de Grey 19. Sie hat vor 1420 in Europa Lord William Lovell Holland VII geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 19. Februar 1474 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Thrapston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Deincourt è nata il circa 1402 nel Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Joan de Grey, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Lord William Lovell Holland VII prima del 1420, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 febbraio 1474, nel Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Deincourtが約1402年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアティトチマーッシュで生まれた時，父John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourtは22歳，母Joan de Greyは19歳であった。1420年以前にヨーロッパでLord William Lovell Holland VIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1474年2月19日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスラプストンで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Deincourt(이)가 대략 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 티트ch마시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Grey(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1420년 이전 우럽에서 Lord William Lovell Holland VII(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1474년 2월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 스라프스턴에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Deincourt nasceu aproximadamente 1402, em Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Grey, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord William Lovell Holland VII antes 1420, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 19 de fevereiro de 1474, em Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Minster Lovell, Witney, Oxfordshire, Eng: Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Deincourt родилась около 1402 г. в местности тичмарш, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Grey, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord William Lovell Holland VII перед 1420 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 19 февраля 1474 г. в местности трапстон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Deincourt nació aproximadamente 1402, en Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joan de Grey, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Lord William Lovell Holland VII antes de 1420, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de febrero de 1474, en Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
